agents.name: Jett

C.name: Cloudburst
C.description: Throw a brief smoke globe that blocks vision. Hold to curve the trajectory mid-air. Lasts ~4 s.

Q.name: Updraft
Q.description: Instantly propel yourself upward. Use to reach high ground or dodge.

E.name: Tailwind
E.description: Dash a short distance in your movement direction. Charges refresh on Bladestorm kills.

X.name: Bladestorm
X.description: Equip 5 throwing knives. L-click: throw single knife. R-click: throw all remaining. Kills refresh all knives.

agents.playstyle: Entry duelist. Tailwind into aggressive angles; Updraft for elevated positions or dodging. Pairs with Op or Vandal.
agents.economy_tip: Can run light shield + Sheriff on pistol rounds for aggressive peeks.

agents.name: Reyna

C.name: Leer
C.description: Throw a spectral eye that nearsights ALL enemies who see it (through walls). Can be shot and destroyed.

Q.name: Devour
Q.description: Instantly consume a Soul Orb (dropped by kills) to heal up to 150 HP over time. Overheal during Empress.

E.name: Dismiss
E.description: Consume a Soul Orb to become briefly invulnerable. During Empress: also become intangible (pass through objects).

X.name: Empress
X.description: Enter combat trance: instant reloads, rapid fire rate, reduced equip time. Kills grant free Devour/Dismiss casts and reset the timer.

agents.playstyle: Snowball duelist. Relies on getting first kill to chain Devour/Dismiss. Best in structured team comps that set her up.
agents.economy_tip: Full-buy every round; Leer is cheap to supplement fights.

agents.name: Phoenix

C.name: Blaze
C.description: Create a curving wall of fire that blocks vision, deals damage to enemies, and heals Phoenix when he stands in it.

Q.name: Curveball
Q.description: Throw a curving flash orb. L-click curves left; R-click curves right. Briefly blinds all who see it.

E.name: Hot Hands
E.description: Throw a fire orb that bounces once and creates a damaging zone on landing. Phoenix heals while standing in it.

X.name: Run It Back
X.description: Mark current position. If killed or ult expires, respawn at marked spot with full health. No soul orbs needed.

agents.playstyle: Self-sustaining duelist. Blaze + Hot Hands enable off-angle fights with built-in healing. Run It Back for aggressive intel.
agents.economy_tip: Hot Hands (100) is the cheapest self-heal in the game; always buy it.

agents.name: Neon

C.name: Fast Lane
C.description: Sprint in a direction to throw two parallel energy lines forward, creating vision-blocking walls that also damage enemies passing through.

Q.name: Relay Bolt
Q.description: Throw a bolt that concusses on first contact, then bounces once and concusses again.

E.name: High Gear
E.description: Sprint at high speed. R-click while sprinting to slide (1 charge, refreshes on 2 kills).

X.name: Overdrive
X.description: Unlimited sprint and slides. Fire a lightning beam as primary weapon. Kill extends duration.

agents.playstyle: Speed-based entry duelist. Fast Lane creates instant site-execute smokes; Relay Bolt replaces a flash. Best on maps with long corridors.
agents.economy_tip: High Gear is free; Fast Lane (300) is the key buy for executes.

agents.name: Yoru

C.name: Fakeout
C.description: Deploy echo footsteps, or activate a decoy clone that runs forward and flashes enemies when shot. Excellent for misdirection.

Q.name: Blindside
Q.description: Toss an underhanded flash that activates on contact with a solid surface. Cannot self-blind.

E.name: Gatecrash
E.description: Throw a tether that travels forward; activate to teleport to it. Can send a decoy instead. Refreshes on kill.

X.name: Dimensional Drift
X.description: Enter a ghost dimension: invisible and invulnerable to enemy vision. Hear/see enemies but cannot shoot. Can place Gatecrash tethers.

agents.playstyle: Deception and flanking duelist. Dimensional Drift enables deep scouting and denying info. High skill ceiling.
agents.economy_tip: Fakeout (100) is dirt cheap misdirection; always buy both charges.

agents.name: Iso

C.name: Contingency
C.description: Push an expanding energy column forward that blocks all bullets (not movement). Use to shield pushes or cut angles.

Q.name: Undercut
Q.description: Throw a destabilizing field disk that passes through walls. Enemies hit receive Fragile (take increased damage) briefly.

E.name: Double Tap
E.description: Enter a focused state; next kill creates a temporary shield around Iso. Refreshes on kill or shield break.

X.name: Kill Contract
X.description: Link to a target enemy. Both are pulled into a private 1v1 arena. Winner returns to main game.

agents.playstyle: Duel-focused duelist. Double Tap rewards trading aggressively. Contingency creates instant linear cover mid-execute.
agents.economy_tip: Double Tap is free; always activate it before entering site.

agents.name: Brimstone

C.name: Stim Beacon
C.description: Place a beacon that pulses, giving nearby allies Rapid Fire (increased fire rate). Lasts ~12 s.

Q.name: Incendiary
Q.description: Launch a canister that creates a large damaging fire zone on impact. Effective for post-plant and site denial.

E.name: Sky Smoke
E.description: Open map view and click up to 3 locations to call in large smoke clouds (~19 s duration). Can be done from range.

X.name: Orbital Strike
X.description: Target a location on the minimap to unleash a sustained laser strike dealing heavy damage. Lingers ~6 s.

agents.playstyle: Anchor controller. Sky Smoke is the most reliable 3-smoke setup in the game. Stim Beacon pairs with Op picks on contact.
agents.economy_tip: Always buy at least 2 smokes (200 cr total). Incendiary can replace a Molly.

agents.name: Viper

C.name: Snake Bite
C.description: Fire a canister of acid that creates a small lingering acid pool dealing damage and applying Fragile/slow.

Q.name: Poison Cloud
Q.description: Toss a gas emitter. Activate to create a lingering smoke cloud that decays enemies inside. Deactivate to pick up and redeploy. Uses fuel.

E.name: Toxic Screen
E.description: Deploy a long line of gas emitters through any terrain. Activate to raise a wall of poison smoke. Uses fuel. Recharges over time.

X.name: Viper's Pit
X.description: Create a massive toxic cloud covering a large area. Enemies inside decay and lose vision. Viper gains enhanced vision inside and reduced decay effect.

agents.playstyle: Dominant on closed maps (Icebox, Breeze, Pearl). Pit can lock an entire site post-plant. Toxic Screen splits the map every round for free.
agents.economy_tip: Toxic Screen is free — always use it. Snake Bite (200) is the cheapest Fragile applicator.

agents.name: Omen

C.name: Shrouded Step
C.description: Short teleport to a targeted nearby location. Great for repositioning and mind games.

Q.name: Paranoia
Q.description: Fire a shadow projectile in a straight line that nearsights ALL enemies it passes through, including through walls.

E.name: Dark Cover
E.description: Lob a shadow sphere that travels through geometry and expands into a large opaque smoke (~15 s). Hold to extend range.

X.name: From the Shadows
X.description: Teleport to any location on the map (via minimap select). Appears as a visible shadow first; the teleport can be cancelled by killing the shadow.

agents.playstyle: Most versatile controller. Dark Cover smokes ANY angle through walls. Paranoia through walls is a hard-to-block flash. From the Shadows flanks are map-defining.
agents.economy_tip: Dark Cover (100/charge) is the cheapest per-smoke in the game. Paranoia (300) is situational — skip on eco.

agents.name: Astra

C.name: Nova Pulse
C.description: Place a star on the map; activate it remotely to create a concussing pulse in that area.

Q.name: Nebula
Q.description: Place a star; activate it to create a smoke cloud. Can be dissipated briefly to create a fake pullback, then reinstated.

E.name: Gravity Well
E.description: Place a star; activate it to pull all nearby enemies toward the center, then stun them. Enemies inside take no damage but are very vulnerable.

X.name: Cosmic Divide
X.description: Create an infinite-length wall across the entire map that blocks bullets and significantly muffles audio on either side.

agents.playstyle: High-ceiling controller for coordinated teams. 5 stars allow complex smoke+util combos from anywhere. Weakest in 1v1 situations.
agents.economy_tip: All star placements cost 200 each; buy a minimum of 3 stars per round for meaningful impact.

agents.name: Harbor

C.name: Cove
C.description: Throw a sphere of water that creates a temporary, bullet-resistant bubble shield. Great for spike-plant cover.

Q.name: High Tide
Q.description: Send forward a wave of water that curves with mouse movement, creating a long water wall blocking vision. Recharges over time.

E.name: Cascade
E.description: Send a wave of water rolling forward. Enemies hit are slowed.

X.name: Reckoning
X.description: Call geysers that erupt from the ground in a large area, concussing enemies they hit. Landing pattern adapts to enemy positions.

agents.playstyle: Entry-controller hybrid. High Tide creates moving smokes for live pushes. Cove is the only bullet-resistant shield in the game.
agents.economy_tip: High Tide is free. Cascade (300) is the biggest cost; consider skipping one charge on eco.

agents.name: Clove

C.name: Pick-Me-Up
C.description: Absorb the life force of a kill or assist to gain a temporary burst of move speed and bonus HP.

Q.name: Meddle
Q.description: Throw a smoke pellet that applies Decay (reduces max HP) to enemies in the area.

E.name: Ruse
E.description: Place smoke clouds at targeted locations. Unique: can be activated even after Clove's death.

X.name: Not Dead Yet
X.description: Upon death, if Clove gets a kill or assist within the window, they respawn with partial HP. Only one respawn per life.

agents.playstyle: Aggressive controller. Not Dead Yet incentivizes playing forward. Ruse smokes persist post-death, which is unique among controllers.
agents.economy_tip: Pick-Me-Up (100) and Ruse (100) are dirt cheap. Buy both every round.

agents.name: Sova

C.name: Shock Bolt
C.description: Fire an electric arrow that deals damage and stuns on exploding. Hold fire to extend range; use bounces with R-click (up to 2 bounces).

Q.name: Recon Bolt
Q.description: Fire a dart that bounces (hold for bounces) and scans on landing, revealing all nearby enemies. Can be recalled. Recharges on kill.

E.name: Owl Drone
E.description: Fly a remote drone that fires a tracking dart; enemies hit are revealed for several seconds.

X.name: Hunter's Fury
X.description: Fire up to 3 long-range blasts through walls that deal 80 damage and reveal all enemies in their path. Each blast is independent.

agents.playstyle: Information-dominant initiator. Recon Bolt is free intel every round. Lineups for Shock Bolt and Recon Bolt take practice but are the highest-value Sova skill.
agents.economy_tip: Recon Bolt is free — always equip and use it. Owl Drone (300) can be skipped on eco.

agents.name: Breach

C.name: Aftershock
C.description: Charge and fire a slow-triggering burst through the wall, dealing heavy damage to enemies on the other side. 3-round delayed explosion.

Q.name: Flashpoint
Q.description: Charge a blinding flash that fires through the surface you're facing. Anyone on the other side of the wall is blinded.

E.name: Fault Line
E.description: Charge a seismic blast forward that concusses all enemies in its path. Recharges over time.

X.name: Rolling Thunder
X.description: Charge and fire a massive seismic cascade forward that concusses and knocks up all enemies in its path. Very wide, impossible to avoid.

agents.playstyle: Through-wall utility king. Flashpoint through walls is the safest flash in the game. Fault Line into a site is a free take if opponents aren't off-angles.
agents.economy_tip: Aftershock (100) is underrated for post-plant. Flashpoint (250) is the must-buy.

agents.name: Skye

C.name: Trailblazer
C.description: Remotely control a wolf trinket. L-click to lunge and concuss enemies on impact. Can scout corners safely.

Q.name: Guiding Light
Q.description: Send a hawk that you can activate mid-flight to flash. Hold to curve. Cannot self-flash.

E.name: Regrowth
E.description: Channel to heal nearby teammates. Cannot heal yourself. Recharges on kill.

X.name: Seekers
X.description: Unleash 3 seeker creatures that find and nearsight the 3 closest enemies. Can be outrun.

agents.playstyle: Heal + info initiator. 3 charges of Guiding Light are the best flash economy in the game. Trailblazer scouts + concusses corners safely.
agents.economy_tip: Regrowth is free healing — position near teammates. Guiding Light (250) is the must-buy.

agents.name: KAY/O

C.name: FRAGMENT
C.description: Throw a blade that sticks to the ground and explodes in 3 cycles, dealing damage in a radius. Similar to a molly.

Q.name: FLASH/drive
Q.description: Toss a flash grenade. L-click: large slow-pop flash. R-click: small fast-pop flash. Both blind enemies.

E.name: ZERO/point
E.description: Throw a suppression blade. Enemies hit cannot use their abilities for ~8 s. Reveals their location briefly. Recharges on kill.

X.name: NULL/cmd
X.description: Overclock and emit suppression pulses, suppressing all enemies in a large radius. If KAY/O is downed during the ult, allies can stabilize him (revive with partial HP).

agents.playstyle: Ability-suppression initiator. ZERO/point suppressing a site-defender removes their utility before entering. FLASH/drive is reliable two-flash-per-round initiator.
agents.economy_tip: ZERO/point is free info + suppression every round. FRAGMENT (200) is a cheap post-plant tool.

agents.name: Fade

C.name: Haunt
C.description: Throw a crawling orb that reveals and marks nearby enemies on landing. Can be shot and destroyed.

Q.name: Seize
Q.description: Throw a tendril pool that tethers enemies caught in it, dealing decay damage and preventing movement out of range.

E.name: Prowler
E.description: Release a creature that follows the nearest sound or player vision. Reaches target and nearsights. Recharges on kill.

X.name: Nightfall
X.description: Send a wave of nightmare energy that marks, deafens, and decays all enemies it hits across the entire path.

agents.playstyle: Replace Sova when you want aggression. Prowler clears corners without line-of-sight; Seize is a free tether that stops enemy rotations.
agents.economy_tip: Prowler is free every round. Buy Haunt (200) and Seize (200) together for full-buy rounds.

agents.name: Gekko

C.name: Wingman
C.description: Deploy Wingman who runs to the spike location to plant/defuse, or fires a concussing burst at enemies. Recalled after use, then recharges.

Q.name: Dizzy
Q.description: Send Dizzy flying forward; enemies hit by charged plasma blasts are nearsighted. Recalled and recharges on kill.

E.name: Thrash
E.description: Remote-control a creature; lunge into enemies to detain them briefly. Recalled and recharges on kill.

X.name: Mosh Pit
X.description: Throw Mosh who creates a large unstable area; after a delay it explodes for massive damage.

agents.playstyle: Spike-focused initiator. Wingman can plant while you hold angles. Dizzy is a long-range nearsight initiator. Thrash can clear a corner in a duel.
agents.economy_tip: Thrash is free. Buy Dizzy (250) for flash value. Wingman (300) is ideal when you need off-angle planting coverage.

agents.name: Sage

C.name: Barrier Orb
C.description: Erect a large solid wall. R-click to rotate before placing. Blocks movement and vision. Decays over time.

Q.name: Slow Orb
Q.description: Throw an orb that creates a large slow field on the ground. Enemies in it are slowed and make loud footsteps.

E.name: Healing Orb
E.description: Heal yourself (over time) or a teammate (instantly to 100 HP). Cannot use during combat. Recharges over ~45 s.

X.name: Resurrection
X.description: Target a dead ally to fully revive them with full HP. They come back with their current weapon and armor.

agents.playstyle: Hard sentinel anchor. Barrier Orb can block a choke permanently. Slow Orb under spike for post-plant is essential. Healing Orb provides sustained HP advantage.
agents.economy_tip: Barrier Orb (400) is expensive; skip on eco. Slow Orb (200) is always worth buying.

agents.name: Cypher

C.name: Cyber Cage
C.description: Place a small cage; activate remotely to create a vision-blocking dome and slow enemies passing through. Very cheap intel denial.

Q.name: Spycam
Q.description: Place a remote camera on a surface. Activate to view its feed and fire a tracking dart that reveals the hit enemy.

E.name: Trapwire
E.description: Place a tripwire across an area; enemies who cross it are tethered, decayed, and revealed if they don't destroy it in time.

X.name: Neural Theft
X.description: Use on an enemy corpse to reveal the locations of all living enemies on the map (twice in quick succession).

agents.playstyle: Information-dominant sentinel. Tripwires + Spycam give full coverage of one side of the map. Best on one-site anchor roles.
agents.economy_tip: Cyber Cage (100) is cheapest vision blocker in game. Always buy both Trapwires (400 total) and Spycam (150).

agents.name: Killjoy

C.name: Alarmbot
C.description: Place a bot that detects nearby enemies and explodes when triggered, applying Vulnerable (increased incoming damage) briefly.

Q.name: Nanoswarm
Q.description: Throw a grenade that stays hidden; activate remotely to unleash a damaging nanoswarm cloud. Best post-plant tool.

E.name: Turret
E.description: Deploy a turret that tracks and fires at enemies in a 180-degree cone. Can be recalled. Free intel + chip damage.

X.name: Lockdown
X.description: Deploy a device with a 13-second wind-up that detains all enemies in a very large radius. Destroyable but punishing.

agents.playstyle: Best post-plant and site-anchor sentinel. Nanoswarm under spike with spike-planted is one of the highest-value post-plant combos in competitive.
agents.economy_tip: Turret is free; always deploy it. Nanoswarm (200 each) are the highest-value buy.

agents.name: Chamber

C.name: Headhunter
C.description: Activate to equip a powerful hand cannon. R-click to aim down sights for long range. Buys 1–4 bullets.

Q.name: Rendezvous
Q.description: Place two anchor points. Stand near one to instantly teleport to the other. Refreshes on kill.

E.name: Trademark
E.description: Place a trap that scans for enemies; slows in a radius when triggered. Teleports away when Chamber is far from it.

X.name: Tour de Force
X.description: Equip a custom high-powered sniper rifle. Kills create a large slowing zone at the kill location. 5 bullets.

agents.playstyle: Operator-focused sentinel. Rendezvous enables peek-and-retreat with Op. Trademark traps one flank so Chamber can Op the other.
agents.economy_tip: Rendezvous is free teleport resets. Headhunter (100) is the cheapest scoped weapon on pistol round.

agents.name: Deadlock

C.name: GravNet
C.description: Throw a grenade that explodes and forces all caught enemies to crouch and be unable to jump briefly.

Q.name: Sonic Sensor
Q.description: Place a sensor that monitors for loud sounds (footsteps, gunfire, abilities). Triggers to concuss enemies nearby.

E.name: Barrier Mesh
E.description: Create disc-shaped barriers of nanowire that block all movement and bounce grenades. Can be deployed through walls. Recharges over time.

X.name: Annihilation
X.description: Fire a nanowire pulse that captures the first enemy hit in a rapidly-moving cocoon, pulling them toward Deadlock's position. Kill them before the cocoon leaves the map for the kill.

agents.playstyle: Lockdown sentinel for tight corridors. Sonic Sensor + Barrier Mesh creates zones enemies cannot safely navigate. GravNet is the best anti-Op tool.
agents.economy_tip: Barrier Mesh is free. Buy Sonic Sensor (200) and GravNet (200) together for full-site coverage.

agents.name: Vyse

C.name: Arc Rose
C.description: Place a bramble device that can be concealed in a surface. Activates on enemy contact to root them in place briefly.

Q.name: Razorvine
Q.description: Throw a tangle of wire that damages and slows enemies passing through the zone.

E.name: Shear
E.description: Raise a wall of metal shards that blocks bullets and movement temporarily. Recharges over time.

X.name: Steel Garden
X.description: Remotely activate all deployed Arc Roses simultaneously, rooting all nearby enemies in place.

agents.playstyle: Area-denial sentinel. Arc Roses act as hidden tripwires with a root instead of a slow. Steel Garden can lock down an entire site on a retake.
agents.economy_tip: Shear is free wall denial. Buy both Arc Roses (400 total) for trap coverage on full-buys.

agents.name: Raze

C.name: Boom Bot
C.description: Deploy a bot that travels forward bouncing off walls. Locks onto enemies in its frontal cone and chases them, exploding for heavy damage on contact.

Q.name: Blast Pack
Q.description: Throw a sticky pack that attaches to surfaces. Reactivate to detonate — deals damage and blasts anything nearby. Also used for satchel-jumping Raze herself.

E.name: Paint Shells
E.description: Throw a cluster grenade that explodes on impact and releases sub-munitions dealing additional damage. Charge resets on every two kills.

X.name: Showstopper
X.description: Equip a rocket launcher and fire a rocket that deals massive area damage on contact with anything. Direct hit is lethal; splash is very high damage.

agents.playstyle: High-damage entry duelist. Blast Pack enables vertical movement and satchel rushes. Boom Bot forces enemies off angles before Raze pushes. Showstopper clears a site instantly.
agents.economy_tip: Blast Pack (100) is the cheapest mobility tool in the game — always buy it. Paint Shells is free; use it to clear corners before entering.

agents.name: Tejo

C.name: Stealth Drone
C.description: Throw a stealth drone and assume direct control of its movement. Fire again while controlling it to trigger a pulse that Suppresses and Reveals enemies hit.

Q.name: Special Delivery
Q.description: Throw a sticky grenade that attaches to the first surface it hits, then explodes to Concuss and deal damage to nearby targets. Alt fire launches with a single bounce.

E.name: Guided Salvo
E.description: Equip an AR targeting system and select up to two target locations on the map. Launches missiles that autonomously navigate to those locations, detonating repeatedly on arrival. Recharges over time.

X.name: Armageddon
X.description: Select an origin point and an end point on the map to launch a tactical strike that unleashes a wave of lethal damaging explosions along the entire strike path.

agents.playstyle: Long-range initiator. Guided Salvo provides free, precise denial from across the map. Stealth Drone suppresses defenders before entry. Special Delivery concusses chokepoints without needing line of sight.
agents.economy_tip: Guided Salvo is free — use it every round to soften defenders. Special Delivery (100) is the cheapest concuss in the game.

agents.name: Waylay

C.name: Saturate
C.description: Throw a cluster of light that explodes on contact with the ground, Hindering nearby players with a powerful movement and weapon slow.

Q.name: Lightspeed
Q.description: Prepare for a burst of speed then dash forward twice. Alt fire to dash once. Only the first dash can send you upward.

E.name: Refract
E.description: Instantly create a beacon of light on the floor. Reactivate to speed back to the beacon as a mote of pure light — invulnerable while traveling. Charge resets every two kills.

X.name: Convergent Paths
X.description: Create an afterimage that projects a beam of light. After a brief delay, gain a powerful speed boost and the beam expands, Hindering all other players caught in the area.

agents.playstyle: Mobility-based entry duelist. Refract enables aggressive peeks with a guaranteed escape route. Lightspeed chains upward then horizontal for vertical entry. Saturate slows defenders mid-push.
agents.economy_tip: Refract is free and refreshes on kills — always keep it active before peeking. Lightspeed (150) is cheap mobility; buy it every full round.

agents.name: Miks

C.name: M-pulse
C.description: Toggle between Concuss and Healing outputs, then throw the device. Upon landing, M-pulse sends out sound waves that either Concuss or Heal players caught in the area.

Q.name: Harmonize
Q.description: Target an ally to activate a Combat Stim on both yourself and that ally. The stim refreshes with each kill. Alt fire to grant the stim to yourself only.

E.name: Waveform
E.description: Equip a map targeter and set up to several smoke locations, then alt fire to deploy smokes at all selected points simultaneously. Recharges over time.

X.name: Bassquake
X.description: Build up sonic radiance and unleash it forward in a wide wave, knocking back, Deafening, and Slowing all players caught in its path.

agents.playstyle: Team-amplifying controller. Waveform provides free smokes every round. M-pulse in Healing mode is the only mid-round area heal in the game. Harmonize stacks with aggressive teammates for combat-stim chains.
agents.economy_tip: Waveform is free — always place smokes. M-pulse (200) doubles as a cheap concuss or heal depending on the situation.

agents.name: Veto

C.name: Crosscut
C.description: Place a vortex on the ground. While in range and looking at it, activate to teleport to the vortex. Can be reclaimed and redeployed during buy phase.

Q.name: Chokehold
Q.description: Throw a fragment of mutation that deploys on hitting the ground, creating a trap that holds enemies in place, Deafening and Decaying them. Enemies can destroy the trap before it activates.

E.name: Interceptor
E.description: Place the Interceptor at a projected location. Once activated, it destroys incoming utility that would bounce off players or be destroyed by gunfire. Enemies can shoot the Interceptor down. Recharges over time.

X.name: Evolution
X.description: Instantly fully mutate, gaining a combat stim, HP regeneration, and immunity to all debuffs for the duration.

agents.playstyle: Anti-utility sentinel. Interceptor hard-counters flash and grenade spam, forcing enemies into pure gunfights. Crosscut provides repositioning to cover multiple angles. Chokehold traps enemies who push your setup.
agents.economy_tip: Interceptor is free and denies entire ability compositions — always deploy it. Chokehold (150) is a cheap trap; buy it every full round.
